programmes.show_name: We Still Kill The Old Way
programmes.show_description: Gritty British crime drama with Ian Ogilvy. A retired gangster returns to London and gets his old crew back together to avenge the death of his brother and restore order to the streets.
Sci-fi thriller with Sylvester Stallone. In a dystopian regime where a cross-country race requires contestants to brutally run down innocent pedestrians, a rebel leader plans to sabotage it.

An American Bully dog allegedly comes flying out of his home and attacks a man and his toy poodle; multiple deep arm bites and vet bills come into play.
When a woman sells her daughter a used car for a 25% profit and then repossesses it, her daughter reports it stolen and gets the police involved.
An allegedly less than desirable tenant accuses her landlord of ignoring a rat infestation and stopping her mail.

On July 31st, 1995 Patricia 'Patti' Berry disappeared on her way home from work, a completely out of character occurrence that would spark a sinister 19 year long mystery.
In October 1988, Patricia Ann Jacob's body was discovered on the bank of the Neches River in Austin, Texas. The Texas Rangers were just beginning a 34-year pursuit of justice.

Lying teenagers, rocks thrown at cars from a bridge, and felony charges come into play when $7,000 in restitution fees is disputed by angry parents.
Two young women attending a video game convention claim they were forced to sleep in their car after seven men showed up in the room they rented.

In January 1989, Mary Hague-Kelly was discovered raped and strangled to death in her home in Texas. In the wake of her murder, it seemed a monster may live close by.
A study in modern crime solving techniques. It demonstrates how traditional investigative techniques can now be significantly enhanced by the scientific power of DNA profiling.
